desc_zh: 深色渐变背景，左侧有轻量化芯片与数据节点图形，右侧向中心汇聚出工作流箭头。
desc_en: Dark gradient hero backdrop with subtle chip and node graphics, converging flow arrows to the center.
alt: Dark gradient hero with AI workflow nodes

desc_zh: 大量零散小窗口、脚本与终端图标错落，中央被一条高亮路径串起，突出碎片化到统一。
desc_en: Scattered mini windows, scripts, and terminal icons connected by one highlighted path.
alt: Fragmented workflows connected into one path

desc_zh: 4 张风格一致卡片，图标分别对应 Serve、Fine-tune、Benchmark、Evaluate，卡片通过箭头形成闭环。
desc_en: Four consistent cards for Serve, Fine-tune, Benchmark, Evaluate linked by arrows.
alt: Product loop cards for serve, fine-tune, benchmark, evaluate

desc_zh: 三层架构：上层 Model Providers，下层 Melix Runtime，中层 Workflows，并用双向箭头表达控制流与数据流。
desc_en: Three-layer architecture chart with model providers, Melix runtime, and workflows using bidirectional arrows.

desc_zh: 环形图显示 Serve → Fine-tune → Benchmark → Evaluate，环状箭头回到 Serve，每个节点用简洁图标。
desc_en: Circular workflow loop showing Serve, Fine-tune, Benchmark, Evaluate, with arrows cycling back to Serve and minimal icons.

desc_zh: macOS 主界面截图，包含菜单、会话列表、模型列表、日志与当前状态。
desc_en: macOS app screenshot showing sidebar, session list, model list, logs, and runtime status.

desc_zh: 终端连续展示依赖安装、启动服务、模型运行、基准测试输出的完整命令流。
desc_en: Terminal command flow showing dependency setup, service start, and benchmark output.

desc_zh: 菜单栏下拉展示会话状态、快捷操作入口和关键指标数值。
desc_en: Menubar dropdown with live session status, quick actions, and core metrics.
usage: macOS Experience 或功能亮点区

desc_zh: 五步时间线示意：Clone → Install → Start service → Open app / CLI → Run first model.
desc_en: Five-step onboarding timeline from clone to first run.

desc_zh: 三列卡片分别用绿色、黄色、灰色标识已支持、进行中、尚未支持。
desc_en: Three-column status cards with green, yellow, and neutral labels.
